name: Toasted Pecan-Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend brown sugar and white sugar with an electric mixer until combined.
4. Add butter and mix until the mixture forms a grainy paste; scrape down sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla extract and continue mixing until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add flour mixture and chocolate chips, blending at low speed until just mixed.
7. Do not overmix.
8. Stir in toasted chopped pecans.
9. Scoop dough with a rounded tablespoon onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing cookies 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 22-24 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool surface.
